claim: No Stable, release, complete conformance, manual assistive-technology, security-completeness, or distribution parity claim is made.

semantics.nativeBasis: named section, native details/summary and native action buttons
semantics.rolePolicy: Error content is an alert; pending and running use aria-busy without a forced live region.

keyboard.behavior: Moves through disclosure, reveal, cancel and retry controls.

nonColor: Every status is visible text and a stable data attribute; sensitive state has explicit text.
responsive: Preformatted text wraps and scrolls within a bounded block; controls keep touch targets.
security: Input/output is rendered as escaped text. Consumer-supplied exact redactions are applied before output. Sensitive values are withheld by default and no tool is executed.
consumerResponsibilities: Authorize, validate, sandbox and audit every tool outside this component.
Do not pass secrets that must never reach the client.
Treat redaction as defense in depth, not a data-loss-prevention boundary.
